arts.ttl: USA wonderkid ‘set to train’ at Manchester United next week ahead of possible transfer
arts.sum: Manchester United appear set to host the 16-year-old, who has impressed onlookers in the USA, throughout next week.

arts.ttl: Team News: Leny Yoro decision made as Man United head coach Ruben Amorim names XI for Nottingham Forest clash
arts.sum: Manchester United head coach Ruben Amorim names his Red Devils XI for Saturday's Premier League clash against Nottingham Forest.

arts.ttl: Manchester United v Nottingham Forest: Premier League – live
arts.sum: Premier League updates from the 5.30pm GMT kick-off Live scoreboard | Everton v Liverpool off | And mail Barry Those teams: Leny Yoro makes his first start for Manchester United, with Harry Maguire making way in defence. Amad, Marcus Rashford and Kobbie Mainoo are all back in the United starting line-up, with Mason Mount, Tyrell Malacia and Noussair Mazraoui all dropping to the bench. For Nottingham Forerst, Neco Williams and Elliot Anderson come back into the side, with Alex Moreno and Nicolas Dominguez dropping out. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Man United vs Nottingham Forest - Premier League: Live score, team news and updates as Ruben Amorim's starting XI is 'LEAKED'
arts.sum: Follow Mail Sport's live blog for the latest score, team news and updates as Manchester United host Nottingham Forest in Premier League action from Old Trafford.

arts.ttl: Sir Jim Ratcliffe names two unexpected attributes to praise Man United head coach Ruben Amorim
arts.sum: Sir Jim Ratcliffe has been talking about his decision to appoint Ruben Amorim as the new head coach at Man Utd.

arts.ttl: Sources: Manchester United trying to sign wonderkid wanted by Real Madrid, he's set to train at Carrington
arts.sum: Some of the world's biggest clubs are after him!

arts.ttl: Man United transfer news: Red Devils 'weighing up £33m January bid' for Premier League centre-back
arts.sum: Manchester United could reportedly make a £33m bid for Crystal Palace's Marc Guehi during the January transfer window.

arts.ttl: Difficult and unpopular decisions needed at Man Utd - Ratcliffe
arts.sum: Manchester United co-owner Sir Jim Ratcliffe says the club has become "mediocre" and warned more "difficult and unpopular decisions" will be needed to get it back where he wants it to be.

arts.ttl: Manchester United already have a secret weapon to solve weakness Arsenal exploited
arts.sum: Man United will be looking to return to winning ways when they host Nottingham Forest at Old Trafford on Saturday evening (5.30pm) following Wednesday night's defeat vs Arsenal.

arts.ttl: Man Utd vs Nottingham Forest LIVE! Premier League match stream, latest team news, lineups, TV, prediction
arts.sum: Red Devils out to respond after Ruben Amorim’s first defeat
